race.comment: The $1 million feature looks a match race. Promising colt THE NEXT EPISODE (2) was a tragedy beaten in the Kindergarten Stakes at Randwick two runs ago when backed off the charts. Put the record straight with an effortless win in the Listed Dalrello over this distance at Eagle Farm last start. Wide gate the only concern but he should be too good. NATURAL FLING (8) met with fervent support and led all the way for a soft win on debut over 1100m at Caulfield a fortnight ago. Meets a smart one but he will be giving her a start and Melham could pinch it without surprising. Last start Bendigo debut winner MARFFIANO (3) has ability but from a tough draw will need lots of luck to match the top pair. Each-way claims. LUCKY PAT (4) was easily accounted for by THE NEXT EPISODE in the Dalrello but can sneak into the frame. Seriously doubt the other runners can land a blow.
